items.title: Presentation: Accelerating LLM-Driven Developer Productivity at Zoox
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Accelerating LLM-Driven Developer Productivity at Zoox. Amit Navindgi discusses the systematic shift at Zoox from fragmented documentation to an AI-driven ecosystem.

items.title: Moonrepo Releases Moon v2.0 with WASM Plugin Toolchains and Overhauled CLI
items.summaryShort: Moonrepo Releases Moon v2.0 with WASM Plugin Toolchains and Overhauled CLI. Moonrepo has released moon v2.0, its first major update since v1, featuring a plugin-based toolchain system and support for multiple configuration formats including

items.title: Scaling Social Systems in Software Organizations
items.summaryShort: Scaling Social Systems in Software Organizations. Fast-scaling teams must rebuild trust and psychological safety as their social systems expand.

items.title: Pinterest Engineers Eliminate CPU Zombies to Resolve Production Bottlenecks
items.summaryShort: Pinterest Engineers Eliminate CPU Zombies to Resolve Production Bottlenecks. Pinterest identified and resolved CPU starvation issues that affected machine learning training jobs on its Kubernetes-based platform, PinCompute.

items.title: Anthropic Traces Six Weeks of Claude Code Quality Complaints to Three Overlapping Product Changes
items.summaryShort: Anthropic Traces Six Weeks of Claude Code Quality Complaints to Three Overlapping Product Changes. Anthropic published a postmortem tracing six weeks of Claude Code quality complaints to three overlapping product-layer changes: a reasoning

items.title: A spyware investigator exposed Russian government hackers trying to hijack Signal accounts
items.summaryShort: A spyware investigator exposed Russian government hackers trying to hijack Signal accounts. A group of likely Russian government hackers tried to hack a security researcher who investigates spyware attacks.

items.title: Cisco cuts nearly 4,000 jobs to spend more on AI, reports ‘record quarterly revenue'
items.summaryShort: Cisco cuts nearly 4,000 jobs to spend more on AI, reports ‘record quarterly revenue'. This is Cisco's latest layoff in recent years, while the company's chief executive touts record revenue and growth.

items.title: Wirestock raises $23M to supply creative multi-modal data to AI labs
items.summaryShort: Wirestock raises $23M to supply creative multi-modal data to AI labs. Wirestock has over 700,000 creators on its platform, which supplies photos, videos and 3D content to AI labs.
